task_completion.description: The agent searches for the keyword 'Theory' specifically in the Title field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero search bar contains 'Theory' with the dropdown set to 'Title, Creator, Year' or 'Title', OR the Advanced Search window is open with the rule 'Title' contains 'Theory'.

task_completion.description: A new standard collection named 'Theoretical Foundations' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left pane of Zotero shows a collection named 'Theoretical Foundations' with a standard folder icon (not a folder with a magnifying glass).

task_completion.description: The agent selects the correct matching papers from the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The three specific papers (Shannon 1948, Shannon & Weaver 1949, Church 1936) are highlighted in the middle pane, or seen being dragged to the new collection.

task_completion.description: The 'Theoretical Foundations' collection contains exactly the three target papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Theoretical Foundations' collection is selected in the left pane, and the middle pane displays exactly three papers: 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication', 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication', and 'An Unsolvable Problem of Elementary Number Theory'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Zotero graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Zotero application window being actively used (clicking menus, typing in search bars, dragging items).

integrity.description: The agent created a standard collection, not a Saved Search.
integrity.visual_evidence: The icon next to 'Theoretical Foundations' in the left pane is a plain yellow or blue folder, NOT a folder with a magnifying glass.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the Zotero SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing 'sqlite3 zotero.sqlite' or SQL INSERT/UPDATE commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target collection name is 'Theoretical Foundations'. The target keyword is 'Theory' in the 'Title' field. There are exactly 3 papers in the library that match this criteria: (1) 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon, 1948), (2) 'An Unsolvable Problem of Elementary Number Theory' (Church, 1936), and (3) 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon & Weaver, 1949). The created collection must be a standard collection (regular folder icon), not a Saved Search (folder with magnifying glass icon).
